title: 📋 Server Rules — {server}
description: Please read and follow these rules to keep the community great for everyone.

fields.name: 1️⃣  Be respectful
fields.value: Treat everyone kindly. No harassment, slurs, or bullying.

fields.name: 2️⃣  No spam
fields.value: No repeated messages, excessive caps, or wall-of-text dumps.

fields.name: 3️⃣  Keep it on-topic
fields.value: Use the right channels for the right conversations.

fields.name: 4️⃣  No NSFW
fields.value: Keep all content safe-for-work unless in a designated channel.

footer.text: Breaking rules may result in a mute or ban.
